Subject: Request for Brief Extension of Contract-Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a short extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete our review thoroughly and return comments that are constructive and final, which we believe will benefit both sides and help move the matter toward a prompt resolution.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether a one-week extension is acceptable, or if you would prefer to discuss an alternative timeframe. Thank you for your consideration, and I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
